new_value: {"notes":"Commit: 4f1c0d04f. Added terminating SLIP_END on partial send to mitigate frame corruption when bt_gatt_notify_cb fails mid-packet. Updated log message. This addresses the protocol-level data corruption described."}
Fixed partial SLIP frame transmission by sending terminating END byte on notify failure. Updated logging and comments. Verified in ble_ipsp_transport.c:583-594. Test suite and build clean.
